mapper.sql: select l.alarm_id, l.config_id, l.pack_num, l.model_num, l.item_code, l.alarm_level, l.data_info, l.status, l.shied, l.shied_time, l.duration, l.remark, l.create_time, l.update_time, c.name as config_Name, c.type from dev_alarm_log l left join dev_config c on l.config_id = c.config_id and c.status = 0
mapper.select: select l.alarm_id, l.config_id, l.pack_num, l.model_num, l.item_code, l.alarm_level, l.data_info, l.status, l.shied, l.shied_time, l.duration, l.remark, l.create_time, l.update_time from dev_alarm_log l left join dev_config c on l.config_id = c.config_id WHERE l.status = 1 or (strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', l.shied_time) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'localtime'))) order by l.alarm_id desc
SELECT count(0) from dev_config c WHERE c.status = 0 AND EXISTS (select 1 from dev_alarm_log l where l.status = 1 and l.config_id = c.config_id)
select count(0) from dev_alarm_log l where l.status = 1 and (l.config_id = 1 or EXISTS (SELECT 1 from dev_config c WHERE l.config_id = c.config_id and c.status = 0))
mapper.insert:
insert into dev_alarm_log
alarm_id, config_id, pack_num, model_num, item_code, alarm_level, data_info, status, remark, create_time, update_time,
#{alarmId}, #{configId}, #{packNum}, #{modelNum}, #{itemCode}, #{alarmLevel}, #{dataInfo}, #{status}, #{remark}, datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'localtime'), datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'localtime'),
mapper.delete:
delete from dev_alarm_log where config_id in
#{configId}

delete from dev_alarm_log where alarm_id in
#{alarmId}
